name: Spinach Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 packages (10 oz) frozen chopped spinach or equivalent
1 can (10 1/2 oz) cream of mushroom soup
1 small can Durkee's French Fried Onion Rings
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spinach according to directions on package, then drain well.
2. In a large skillet, sauté the chopped onion in margarine until softened.
3. Add the cream cheese and canned soup; stir over low heat until the cheese is melted.
4. Mix the onion mixture with the cooked spinach.
5. Transfer the combined ingredients to a greased casserole dish.
6. Top with the French Fried Onion Rings.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30-35 minutes.
